rows.notes: Consensus that '265' is part of the description and no amounts are present in the designated columns. Description from gemini-flash (capital 'Money') is slightly better visually. High confidence.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's interpretation. 'Corn Rent' is clearly a header with no amounts on the same line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amount from the subsequent line to this header. High confidence based on visual.

This row represents the amount '12.8.0', which is visually present immediately below the 'Corn Rent' header. gemini-flash correctly identified this as a separate entry, while gpt-5-mini incorrectly attributed this amount to the 'Corn Rent' header (previous row) and thus effectively missed this distinct entry.
rows.english_description: Corn rent received (unspecified line item).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Corn rent received (unspecified line item), amounting to £12 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are identical. Adopted gpt-5-mini's 'total' row_type due to its position as a subtotal after the rent calculations. Description left null as the amount is in the dedicated columns.
Pounds, shillings, and description are identical. gemini-flash's 'entry' row_type is more appropriate for a specific deduction. Adopted gpt-5-mini's explicit zero for pence (representing the dash).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax deducted from the corn rent receipts, amounting to £34 7s 0d.

rows.description: deduct Old Rent in Reci Arrear
rows.notes: Based on visual verification, the description is 'deduct Old Rent in Reci Arrear'. The amounts are '2' in pounds, '0' in shillings, and a dash (zero) in pence. Both extractors had errors in either description or amount, requiring visual override.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Deduction for old rent in the receipts (arrears), amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: This row corresponds to the intermediate calculation '47.2.-' found visually on the page, which gpt-5-mini correctly identified as a distinct entry (though labeled 'total'). gemini-flash missed this distinct row, instead incorrectly assigning this amount to the subsequent 'Deduct Medenham Timber' line.
